snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! üëÄ


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ‚ñ∫ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ‚ñ∫https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ‚ñ∫https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

snippet.title: THE SUICIDE SQUAD - Rebellion Trailer
snippet.description:
Thought you might like this too. #TheSuicideSquad
 
https://www.facebook.com/thesuicidesquad
https://www.instagram.com/thesuicidesquad
https://twitter.com/SuicideSquadWB
https://www.thesuicidesquad.com
 
From writer/director James Gunn comes Warner Bros. Pictures‚Äô superhero action adventure ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad,‚Äù featuring a collection of the most degenerate delinquents in the DC lineup.
 
Welcome to hell‚Äîa.k.a. Belle Reve, the prison with the highest mortality rate in the US of A.  Where the worst Super-Villains are kept and where they will do anything to get out‚Äîeven join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X.  Today‚Äôs do-or-die assignment?  Assemble a collection of cons, including Bloodsport, Peacemaker, Captain Boomerang, Ratcatcher 2, Savant, King Shark, Blackguard, Javelin and everyone‚Äôs favorite psycho, Harley Quinn.  Then arm them heavily and drop them (literally) on the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.  Trekking through a jungle teeming with militant adversaries and guerrilla forces at every turn, the Squad is on a search-and-destroy mission with only Colonel Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave‚Ä¶and Amanda Waller‚Äôs government techies in their ears, tracking their every movement.  And as always, one wrong move and they‚Äôre dead (whether at the hands of their opponents, a teammate, or Waller herself).  If anyone‚Äôs laying down bets, the smart money is against them‚Äîall of them. 
 
The film stars Margot Robbie (‚ÄúBirds of Prey,‚Äù ‚ÄúBombshell‚Äù), Idris Elba (‚ÄúAvengers: Infinity War‚Äù), John Cena (upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker,‚Äù ‚ÄúBumblebee‚Äù), Joel Kinnaman (‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚Äù), Jai Courtney (the ‚ÄúDivergent‚Äù franchise), Peter Capaldi (‚ÄúWorld War Z,‚Äù BBC‚Äôs ‚ÄúDoctor Who‚Äù ), David Dastmalchian (upcoming ‚ÄúDune,‚Äù ‚ÄúAnt-Man and the Wasp‚Äù), Daniela Melchior (‚ÄúParque Mayer‚Äù), Michael Rooker (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚Äù films), Alice Braga (‚ÄúElysium‚Äù), Pete Davidson (‚ÄúThe King of Staten Island,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúSaturday Night Live‚Äù), Joaqu√≠n Cosio (‚ÄúSpider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúNarcos: Mexico‚Äù), Juan Diego Botto (‚ÄúThe Europeans‚Äù), Storm Reid (‚ÄúThe Invisible Man,‚Äù ‚ÄúA Wrinkle in Time‚Äù, ‚ÄúEuphoria‚Äù), Nathan Fillion (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy,‚Äù TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúThe Rookie‚Äù), Steve Agee (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚Äù ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚Äù), Sean Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy‚Äù films, the ‚ÄúAvengers‚Äù films), Mayling Ng (‚ÄúWonder Woman‚Äù), Flula Borg (‚ÄúRalph Breaks the Internet‚Äù), Jennifer Holland (‚ÄúBrightburn,‚Äù upcoming HBO Max series ‚ÄúPeacemaker‚Äù) and Tinashe Kajese (TV‚Äôs ‚ÄúValor,‚Äù ‚ÄúThe Inspectors‚Äù), with Sylvester Stallone (the ‚ÄúRocky,‚Äù ‚ÄúRambo‚Äù and ‚ÄúExpendables‚Äù franchises), and Viola Davis (‚ÄúMa Rainey‚Äôs Black Bottom,‚Äù ‚ÄúSuicide Squad‚Äù).
 
Gunn (the ‚ÄúGuardian of the Galaxy‚Äù films) directs from his own screenplay, based on characters from DC.  The film is produced by Charles Roven and Peter Safran, with Zack Snyder, Deborah Snyder, Walter Hamada, Chantal Nong Vo, Nikolas Korda and Richard Suckle executive producing.
 
Gunn‚Äôs creative team includes director of photography Henry Braham (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2‚Äù), production designer Beth Mickle (‚ÄúCaptain Marvel‚Äù), editors Fred Raskin (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2,‚Äù ‚ÄúOnce Upon a Time‚Ä¶ In Hollywood‚Äù) and Christian Wagner (the ‚ÄúFast & Furious‚Äù films) and Oscar-nominated costume designer Judianna Makovsky (‚ÄúGuardians of the Galaxy Vol 2,‚Äù ‚ÄúAvengers: Endgame,‚Äù ‚ÄúHarry Potter and the Sorcerer‚Äôs Stone‚Äù).  The music is by John Murphy (‚ÄúKick-Ass‚Äù).
 
Warner Bros. Pictures Presents An Atlas Entertainment/Peter Safran Production, A James Gunn Film, ‚ÄúThe Suicide Squad.‚Äù  The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures.  It is set for release nationwide in theaters and IMAX on August 6, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.

snippet.title: Starship | SN11 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Tuesday, March 30, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 11 (SN11) ‚Äì our fourth high-altitude flight test of a Starship prototype from Starbase in Texas. Similar to previous high-altitude flight tests of Starship, SN11 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äì approximately 10 km in altitude. SN11 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN11‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs fourth high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
snippet.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚Äù
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Listen to Demi Lovato‚Äôs new song, ‚ÄúDancing With The Devil‚Äù: https://demilovato.lnk.to/DWTD/youtubemusic
Pre-order Demi Lovato‚Äôs new album ‚ÄòDancing With The Devil‚Ä¶ The Art Of Starting Over‚Äô https://DemiLovato.lnk.to/DWTDTAOSOID

‚ÄúKau akan benar-benar mengetahui siapa yang berada di sisimu ketika kehidupanmu hancur berantakan.‚Äù
Demi menjalani rehabilitasi dan memulai perjalanannya untuk pemulihan, tetapi dengan berbagai rintangan. Di saat dia kembali naik panggung untuk pertama kali sejak dirinya overdosis, dia perlu menemukan keseimbangan di dalam hidupnya.
Sumber:
Saluran siaga SAMHSA untuk perorangan dan anggota keluarga yang mengalami gangguan kesehatan mental dan/atau penggunaan substansi
1-800-662-HELP (4357)
TTY: 1-800-487-4889

www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)

en.title: reclaiming power : Dancing with the Devil
en.description:
‚ÄúYou really find out who‚Äôs there for you when the world falls out from under your feet.‚Äù
Demi goes to rehab and begins her road to recovery, but with bumps along the way. As she returns to the stage for the first time since her overdose, she needs to find balance in her life.
Resources:
 
SAMHSA Hotline for individuals and family members facing mental health and/or substance use disorders
1-800-662-HELP (4357) 
TTY: 1-800-487-4889 
 
National Sexual Assault Hotline
www.rainn.org
1-800-656-HOPE (4673)
 
Or if you need immediate support, please reach out to your local crisis text line:
USA: Text HOME to 741741
UK: Text SHOUT to 85258
Canada: Text CONNECT to 686868 or 741741
 
For mental health education and resources go to Hope for the Day at hftd.org 
 
Learn how to save lives at endoverdose.net.

Production Companies: OBB Pictures, SB Films
Director: Michael D. Ratner
Executive Producers: Michael D. Ratner, Scott Ratner, Scooter Braun, Allison Kaye, Scott Manson, Kfir Goldberg, Miranda Sherman, Andy Mininger

Le premier √©tage appel√© Super Heavy et la second √©tage Starship. Ce lanceur orbital super lourd a une particularit√© tr√®s forte car il sera enti√®rement r√©utilisable ! Cela veut dire que, non seulement le premier √©tage Super Heavy sera r√©cup√©r√©, et c‚Äôest une technologie qu‚Äôon peut voir avec la Falcon 9 de SpaceX, mais √©galement que le deuxi√®me √©tage Starship sera r√©cup√©r√©. Starship poss√®de plusieurs configurations. C‚Äôest un syst√®me de transport de charge lourde (comme des satellites ou du carburants) mais aussi une capsule pour aller sur la station spatiale, un atterrisseur lunaire et un atterrisseur martien ! C‚Äôest quand m√™me dingue ! Ha et j'oubliais, SpaceX pr√©voit √©galement d‚Äôutiliser un Starship pour faire un saut en haute atmosph√®re pour rendre accessibles n‚Äôimporte qu‚Äôelle point de la terre en 30 minutes.

* Masse au d√©collage: 1200 tonnes

snippet.title: Dead by Daylight | All-Kill | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
A famous singer hides a twisted double life. Good thing The Entity loves a show.

The new killer is Ji-Woon Hak, better known to fans across the globe as The Trickster. Famed singer by day, calculating serial killer by night, The Trickster thirsts for notoriety, treating both his music and his murders as high art. The new Survivor is Yun-Jin Lee, a resilient and ambitious music producer who built her reputation on the success of her one and only client ‚Äì The Trickster. Ignoring his true nature in favor of her career, Yun-Jin now stands to pay the ultimate price for her ambition.‚ÄØ 

 The ALL-KILL Chapter is available now in Dead by Daylight.‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 

Learn more about the Chapter: https://bit.ly/3qTs5tm

Dead by Daylight is a multiplayer action/horror game where one player takes on the role of a brutal Killer and the other four play as Survivors. As a Killer, your goal is to sacrifice as many Survivors as possible. As Survivors, your goal is to work together to evade, escape and most importantly ‚Äì stay alive.‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 

BUY GAME: https://buythegame.deadbydaylight.com/

Join the official forum: https://forum.deadbydaylight.com ‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 

Like and follow us on our official Social Media Channels:‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/DeadByDaylight ‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 
- Twitter: https://twitter.com/deadbybhvr ‚ÄØ‚ÄØ 
- Instagram: https://instagram.com/deadbydaylight

Music by Michel F. April

‚ÄØ#DbD #AllKill

Brooklyn, 1973. Sergio assiste √Ý l'assassinat de son p√®re. Il d√©cide de se venger avec style, mais la t√¢che est loin d'√™tre simple quand on est con comme un mur.

Arno Chevrier 
R√©gis Royer 
L√©opold Lemarchand 
Maxence Lap√©rouse 
Lucas Studio
